weaknesses.issue: Abstract is technically detailed but the impact sentence at the end could more strongly foreground the circuit-level interpretation.
weaknesses.fix: Sharpen the closing impact sentence to emphasize the bridge from receptor pharmacology to distributed circuits.

weaknesses.issue: Second paragraph good but could add a transition sentence explicitly setting up the eGFP control that follows.
weaknesses.fix: Add an explicit bridge sentence at the end pointing to the next subsection.

weaknesses.issue: The 'Short-range p' column has 'less than 0.001 / n.s.' entry for C57BL/6 that could be clearer in meaning.
weaknesses.fix: Clarify in caption that 'n.s.' refers to the pan-neuronal short-range comparison being not significant in one of two ranges.

weaknesses.issue: Mention of open-loop vs closed-loop locomotion analyses is brief; could benefit from one more sentence on how these behavioural controls support interpretation.
weaknesses.fix: Add a sentence on behavioural control by open/closed-loop contrast.
